_note: Canonical Happy Cake US catalog. Mirrors web/src/lib/catalog.ts so the website (lib/catalog) and the backend SQLite (this file) describe the same products. Photos are served from the public hackathon CDN. Run `bun src/scripts/db-init.ts --seed` to apply.

products.name: Honey Cake
products.description: Our signature — six layers of golden honey biscuit, soft custard between every one, walnuts on top. Same recipe as the day we opened.

products.name: Whole Honey Cake
products.description: The full honey-cake experience — feeds about a dozen. Hand-decorated, hand-packed. About an hour's notice for cutting and packaging.

products.name: Whole Pistachio Cake
products.description: The full pistachio meringue roll — a long log of meringue, pistachio cream, and fresh raspberry. About 90 minutes to slice and pack. Serves 10–12.

products.name: Whole Cloud Cake
products.description: The full cloud — airy meringue layers and vanilla cream, hand-decorated. Feeds about a dozen. About 90 minutes to finish and pack.

products.name: Whole Tiramisu Cake
products.description: A full tray of tiramisu — espresso-soaked vanilla biscuit, milk-chocolate layers, mascarpone. Serves 10–12. Two hours notice.

products.name: Pistachio Roll
products.description: Light meringue rolled with pistachio cream and the sour-sweet of fresh raspberry. By the slice, fresh from the case.

products.name: Cloud Cake
products.description: Light, airy layers of meringue and delicate vanilla cream. Our most-loved seasonal slice — eats like dessert and breakfast at once.

products.name: Tiramisu
products.description: Vanilla biscuit soaked with espresso, milk-chocolate layers, mascarpone cream. A classic for the afternoon slow-down.

products.name: Chak-chak
products.description: Crisp fried-dough nuggets bound with honey — a Central-Asian classic, perfect with tea or coffee. Sold by the cluster.

products.name: Chocolate Truffle Bites
products.description: Cocoa-rolled truffle bites with a hint of espresso — small, rich, dangerously poppable. Sold in pairs.

products.name: Custom Birthday Cake
products.description: Designed with you — flavors, fillings, message, photo or fondant. Serves 12–20. Minimum 24 hours notice; vegan or gluten-free needs 36 hours.

products.name: Office Dessert Box
products.description: Curated assortment for offices and gatherings — slices, rolls, mini cakes. Three hours notice for an assortment, longer for groups over fifty.

products.name: Morning Pastry Mix
products.description: Mixed pastries and bite-size cakes — the right number of choices to keep a 10-person meeting happy.

lead_time.note: Kitchen has 420 minutes/day total; per-product capacity is the limiting constraint. Always check via `kitchen_get_capacity` before promising.

pickup.address: 350 Promenade Way Suite 500, Sugar Land, TX 77478

allergens.shared_kitchen: Eggs, dairy, gluten, tree nuts handled in same kitchen — cross-contamination possible.
allergens.critical_allergy_protocol: For severe allergies, please escalate — Askhat reviews each request.

cancellation.note: Late cancellations are charged in full because the kitchen has already worked.
